examples: The rain beated strongly against the panes, the wind blew tempestuously.
The rate of photosynthesis decreased tempestuously when the soil moisture lowered to 15.5%.
In recent years, as the global financial market fluctuates more tempestuously , the bank is becoming more and more inclined to decrease credit loans in order to avoid the…
Rarely can a presidency of the European Union have started more tempestuously.
